text:
The Adults' Way of Life is the 55th episode of Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 96: Two Strong Women, Chapter 97: The Two Philosophers and Chapter 98: Greed Without Limits.
Appearing in the background of this episode's title card are one of the Transmutation Circles engraved on Alex Louis Armstrong's gauntlets and the Flamel.
When Briggs soldiers are celebrating their victory, they say in the original dub: "hip hip hooray," which is a term that comes since 19th century in England.
